diagrams.title: Memory Read Operation Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the sequence of signals and data transfer during a memory read operation
elements: CPU places address on address bus
Memory places data on data bus
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how data is retrieved from memory locations

diagrams.title: Memory Write Operation Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the sequence of signals and data transfer during a memory write operation
elements: CPU places address on address bus
CPU places data on data bus
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how data is stored to memory locations

diagrams.title: Stack PUSH and POP Operations
diagrams.description: Visual representation of stack memory growth and data management
diagrams.purpose: Understanding LIFO memory operations for function calls and temporary storage

diagrams.title: Memory Hierarchy Pyramid
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical organization of memory in a computer system
elements: Trade-off: Speed vs Size vs Cost
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the memory pyramid and why modern systems use multiple levels
